prompt: 用中文跟我說  我以後要怎麼audio 把流程送到我的slack

input.command:
cd /d/mybot
echo "=== 找 slack 憑證 ==="
ls -la git/tool/ 2>/dev/null | grep -i "token\|slack\|hook\|secret\|cred"
echo "--- 全域搜尋（檔名）---"
find /d/mybot -maxdepth 3 -iname "*slack*" -not -path "*/node_modules/*" -not -path "*/.git/*" 2>/dev/null | head
echo "--- 環境變數 ---"
env | grep -i slack | sed 's/=.*/=<set>/'

cd /d/mybot/friday 2>/dev/null && ls -la && echo "=== bot dir ===" && ls -la bot/ 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo "=== 找 xoxb / xoxp / webhook ==="
grep -rlE "xoxb-|xoxp-|hooks\.slack\.com" /d/mybot --include="*" -I 2>/dev/null | grep -v "/.git/" | head -8
input.description: Look for Slack bot token or webhook
